dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: (In between sobs) F*#&! I went and drove my car into the lake!'

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: I should've listened to Irene. I'm so stupid!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: She was all I could think of, it's like everything was in slow motion...I've gotta apologize to her.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: I need to get out of here. Going back through the forest on foot is safer than trying to have someone drive in for me.
